data.title: 国际服YouTube频道订阅数突破30万
data.summary: [Special Thank-You Gift for Reaching 300K Subscribers on the Global YouTube Channel!] Sensei! The Bl
data.body:
[Special Thank-You Gift for Reaching 300K Subscribers on the Global YouTube Channel!]

Sensei! The Blue Archive Global YouTube channel has reached 300,000 subscribers!
To thank you for all your love and support, we’ve prepared a special gift just for you. Please check it out and enjoy~ 🎁

#BlueArchive
